summary: Frontend testing of Gold Standard iOS Premium UI/UX improvements on Celebrate and Dine pages. All critical features verified working on mobile viewport (390x844).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS Premium UI/UX improvements verified working on both Celebrate and Dine pages. All glassmorphism, bento grid, haptic feedback, and iOS typography classes are correctly applied.

celebrate_page_mobile.details: Page loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844) with data-testid='celebrate-page'

dine_page_mobile.details: Page loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844) with data-testid='dine-page'

ios_premium_css_import.details: ios-premium.css is properly imported in index.css (line 14)

bento_grid_layout.details: Bento grid with 2-column layout (188px each) on mobile. Featured card spans full width (109.5% of parent). 6 cards in Celebrate bento grid.

glassmorphism_cards.details: glass-card class applied with backdrop-filter: blur(20px). Celebrate: 7 instances, Dine: 5 glass-card-dine instances

haptic_feedback_classes.details: haptic-card (Celebrate: 113, Dine: 8) and haptic-btn (Celebrate: 11, Dine: 1) classes applied for touch feedback effects

ios_typography.details: iOS-style typography classes applied - ios-title-1: 2, ios-title-2: 3, ios-headline: 4 on Celebrate page

pill_dock_filters.details: pill-dock and pill-item classes applied with 8 filter items for smart cake discovery

section_animations.details: section-fade-in (Celebrate: 13, Dine: 6) and stagger classes (stagger-1 to stagger-6) applied for smooth animations

celebrate_experiences_section.details: 'Celebrations, Perfected' section renders with 6 experience cards (birthday-bash, gotcha-day, pawty-planning, puppy-shower, pet-wedding, milestone)

dine_experiences_section.details: Elevated Concierge section renders with experience cards (private-chef, home-dining, birthday-dining)

how_it_works_section.details: 4 steps rendered with glass-card styling and haptic-card effects

tab_navigation.details: 'All Celebrate' tab found on Celebrate page, 'All Dine' tab found on Dine page

bottom_safe_area.details: pb-24 class found on 2 elements for iOS safe area bottom padding

theme_classes.details: theme-celebrate and theme-dine classes present in DOM for theming
